debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
primes : List ℕ
h_precond : findExponents_precond n primes
⊢ findExponents_postcond n primes (findExponents n primes h_precond) h_precond

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h₁ : n > 0 := h_precond.1
  have h₂ : primes.length > 0 := h_precond.2.1
  have h₃ : primes.all (fun p => Nat.Prime p) := h_precond.2.2.1
  have h₄ : List.Nodup primes := h_precond.2.2.2
  have h₅ : n = (findExponents n primes h_precond).foldl (fun acc (p, e) => acc * p ^ e) 1 := by sorry
  have h₆ : (findExponents n primes h_precond).all (fun (p, _) => p ∈ primes) := by sorry
  have h₇ : primes.all (fun p => (findExponents n primes h_precond).any (fun pair => pair.1 = p)) := by sorry
  exact ⟨h₅, h₆, h₇⟩
  -- !benchmark @end proof
